text:
RBL Bank Clears Key Approval Milestone
RBL Bank is in focus after completing the regulatory and government approval process for Emirates NBD Bank’s proposed strategic investment. Emirates NBD has received Ministry of Finance approval to acquire more than 49% and up to 74% stake in RBL Bank.
Source: NSE, 15 May
#RBLBank #EmiratesNBD #MarketUpdate

Stocks to Watch – 18 May 2026

🏦 RBL Bank
Received all key regulatory approvals for Emirates NBD to acquire a 51%–74% stake via preferential issue at ₹280/share. Emirates NBD to invest around ₹26,850 crore and become promoter of the bank.

💧 WPIL
Its African arm secured a major water works project in South Africa valued at ₹4,405 crore, with WPIL’s share estimated at ₹1,173 crore.

🧪 Tatva Chintan Pharma Chem – Q4FY26 Update
• Net profit stood at ₹10.3 crore vs ₹1 crore YoY
• Revenue grew 24.4% to ₹134 crore
• EBITDA jumped to ₹28.1 crore vs ₹8.9 crore
• EBITDA margin expanded sharply to 20.9% vs 8.3%

🏨 ITC Hotels
Acquired a 100% stake in Zuri Hotels and Resorts for an enterprise value of ₹205 crore.

✈️ InterGlobe Aviation (IndiGo)
Delhi government reduced VAT on ATF from 25% to 7% for six months, providing relief to airline operators.

🔄 Mangalam Worldwide
Board approved a 1:10 stock split.

text:
The building was ready last year, only the ribbon was to be cut.

A struggling Indian bank RBL has been acquired by Emirates NBD in a commercial transaction that was negotiated, announced, and approved across multiple regulators over several months in 2025.

Modi flew to Abu Dhabi, stood next to Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed, and the Finance Ministry's stamp was timed to coincide with the visit. 

Godi media and sanghis clapped.
